sourceBoundary.en: This storyboard uses MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 5-11 as the direct source. It covers linear systems, solution sets as all tuples satisfying every equation, consistent/inconsistent systems, the two-variable line-intersection picture, the no/unique/infinite trichotomy, equivalent systems, and the three reversible equation operations. Practice Set 1 supports the ordered-tuple and equation-operation checks. It does not use later RREF pivot-count criteria except as a bridge to later notes.
sourceBoundary.zh-hk: 此 storyboard 以 MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 5-11 為直接來源，涵蓋線性方程組、解集作為滿足每條方程的全部有序元組、一致/不一致、二元直線交集圖像、無解/唯一解/無限多解三種情況、等價方程組，以及三種可逆方程操作。Practice Set 1 支持有序元組與方程操作的檢查。不使用後面 RREF 的主元計數判準，只把它作為後續筆記的橋接。
sourceBoundary.zh-cn: 此 storyboard 以 MATH1030-Notes.pdf pp. 5-11 为直接来源，涵盖线性方程组、解集作为满足每条方程的全部有序元组、相容/不相容、二元直线交集图像、无解/唯一解/无限多解三种情况、等价方程组，以及三种可逆方程操作。Practice Set 1 支持有序元组与方程操作的检查。不使用后面 RREF 的主元计数判准，只把它作为后续笔记的桥接。

segments.cardTitle: A system is an intersection of conditions
segments.goal: Show that a tuple must pass every equation, so the solution set is the intersection of individual equation solution sets.
beats: Display two equations as two simultaneous conditions.
Represent each condition as a set.
Highlight the overlap as the solution set.
segments.animation: two condition cards feed into overlapping solution-set regions

segments.goal: Use the source two-line example to show a unique solution.
beats: Plot x + y = 5 and 2x - 3y = -5.
Mark their intersection at (2, 3).
Label the solution set as a singleton.
segments.animation: two lines cross at one highlighted point

segments.goal: Show an inconsistent system as an empty intersection.
beats: Plot 2x - 3y = -5 and 2x - 3y = 0.
Show that the lines never meet.
Label the solution set as empty.
segments.animation: parallel lines are shaded with no intersection marker

segments.goal: Show infinitely many solutions as a whole line.
beats: Plot 2x - 3y = -5 and -2x + 3y = 5.
Show that the equations describe the same line.
Use a parameter to mark infinitely many points.
segments.animation: several points appear along one coincident line

segments.goal: Connect elimination to equivalent systems and equation-operation safety.
beats: Show a 2 by 2 source example before and after row replacement.
Label the operation E2 <- E2 - 4/3 E1.
Show its inverse and preserve the solution set.
mathBlocks: equivalent systems have equal solution sets
each equation operation has an inverse
segments.animation: one equation system rewrites into a simpler equivalent one while the solution-set badge stays fixed

segments.goal: Bridge the fixed video to the existing augmented-matrix explorer.
beats: Translate x + 2y = 5 and 3x - y = 4 into an augmented matrix.
Point out that each row is one equation.
Send the reader to the embedded explorer.
segments.animation: system cards compress into an augmented matrix and an explorer-practice badge

segments.cardTitle: 方程組是多個條件的交集
segments.goal: 說明一個有序元組必須通過每條方程，所以解集是各條方程解集的交集。
beats: 把兩條方程顯示為兩個同時成立的條件。
把每個條件表示成一個集合。
把重疊部分標成解集。
segments.animation: 兩個條件卡片進入重疊的解集區域

segments.goal: 用來源中的雙直線例子展示唯一解。
beats: 畫出 x + y = 5 和 2x - 3y = -5。
標出交點 (2, 3)。
把解集標成單一元素集合。
segments.animation: 兩條直線交於一個高亮點

segments.goal: 把不一致方程組顯示成空交集。
beats: 顯示兩條直線沒有交點。
把解集標成空集。
segments.animation: 兩條平行線沒有交點標記

segments.goal: 把整條直線展示成無限多解。
beats: 顯示兩條方程描述同一條線。
用參數標出無限多點。
segments.animation: 多個點沿同一條重合直線出現

segments.goal: 把消去法連到等價方程組和方程操作安全性。
beats: 顯示一個 2 by 2 來源例子在行替換前後的形式。
標示操作 E2 <- E2 - 4/3 E1。
顯示逆操作並保持解集。
mathBlocks: 等價方程組有相同解集
每個方程操作都有逆操作
segments.animation: 方程組改寫成較簡單的等價方程組，而解集標籤保持不變

segments.cardTitle: 再把同一方程組包裝起來
segments.goal: 由固定影片接到現有增廣矩陣探索器。
beats: 把 x + 2y = 5 和 3x - y = 4 翻成增廣矩陣。
指出每一行仍是一條方程。
把讀者帶到已嵌入的探索器。
segments.animation: 方程卡片壓縮成增廣矩陣和探索器練習標籤

segments.cardTitle: 方程组是多个条件的交集
segments.goal: 说明一个有序元组必须通过每条方程，所以解集是各条方程解集的交集。
beats: 把两条方程显示为两个同时成立的条件。
把每个条件表示成一个集合。
把重叠部分标成解集。
segments.animation: 两个条件卡片进入重叠的解集区域

segments.goal: 用来源中的双直线例子展示唯一解。
beats: 画出 x + y = 5 和 2x - 3y = -5。
标出交点 (2, 3)。
把解集标成单一元素集合。
segments.animation: 两条直线交于一个高亮点

segments.goal: 把不相容方程组显示成空交集。
beats: 显示两条直线没有交点。
把解集标成空集。
segments.animation: 两条平行线没有交点标记

segments.goal: 把整条直线展示成无限多解。
beats: 显示两条方程描述同一条线。
用参数标出无限多点。
segments.animation: 多个点沿同一条重合直线出现

segments.goal: 把消去法连到等价方程组和方程操作安全性。
beats: 显示一个 2 by 2 来源例子在行替换前后的形式。
标示操作 E2 <- E2 - 4/3 E1。
显示逆操作并保持解集。
mathBlocks: 等价方程组有相同解集
每个方程操作都有逆操作
segments.animation: 方程组改写成较简单的等价方程组，而解集标签保持不变

segments.cardTitle: 再把同一方程组包装起来
segments.goal: 由固定视频接到现有增广矩阵探索器。
beats: 把 x + 2y = 5 和 3x - y = 4 翻成增广矩阵。
指出每一行仍是一条方程。
把读者带到已嵌入的探索器。
segments.animation: 方程卡片压缩成增广矩阵和探索器练习标签
